claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T002_S051_PRE_01 ("So in the future, I believe that's a hard thing. There's no relevant data.") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T005_S032_BLO_01 ("Now, the main issue here with the sampler is one of exploration on hard probl...").
